raw_consumer_statement: I have a Citibank credit card. My limit on XX/XX/year> was {$5100.00} and my balance was around {$5100.00}. I went in to make a payment for {$200.00} but accidentally overpaid it for {$2000.00}. Since it was XXXX XXXX in between the payment didnt post till XXXX. I tried contacting them to refund the {$1800.00} over payment. Turns out on XXXX after receiving my {$2000.00} accidental payment, they ended up lowering my credit limit from {$5100.00} to {$3200.00}. Now they are refusing to fix the error of overpayment by saying I will be over my limit. Even though when I first made the payment my limit was {$5100.00}. I tried contacting them multiple times. They have transferred me from customer service to fraud to credit limit increase then to account supervisor and theyve all said they cant do anything. One of their employees, XXXX XXXX said I should contact my bank and have them do a fraudulent transaction review to get my money back. Citibank has been very unprofessional. Please assist as Ive lost valuable time and effort trying to get though to them.
